lessons.title: What is a Function?
lessons.description: Learn how functions help you reuse code and organize logic.

lessons.title: Defining and Calling Functions
lessons.description: Write your first function and invoke it.

lessons.title: Function Parameters and Arguments
lessons.description: Pass data into functions using parameters.

lessons.title: Variable Scope
lessons.description: Understand local vs global variables inside functions.

lessons.title: Default Parameters and Type Declarations
lessons.description: Set default values and enforce parameter types.

lessons.title: Anonymous Functions and Closures
lessons.description: Create functions without names and use them as values.

lessons.title: Arrow Functions (PHP 7.4+)
lessons.description: Write concise functions with arrow syntax.
